goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stansted airport' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'arrive by 18:45' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from stansted airport and should leave on sunday
The train should arrive by 18:45 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free parking and should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get phone number
